title: Ancient Warfare 3 NPCs
description: AW NPCs can work farms & fight for you!
body:
This mod adds the Ancient Warfare 2 NPCs to modern minecraft. 
- NPCs get food from the townhall or a custom set upkeep point.
- click a worker NPC with a wooden tool to give him a job
- workers want to sleep at night. if you do not set a home, they just stand around waiting to get eaten by monsters

Currently the following workers are added:
- Farmer: works the cropfarm & workes on millstones
- Lumberjack: works the treefarm & workes on the woodmill
- Miner: works the Quarry
